name: @agentmemories/mcp
author: Yorick Chan <yorick@gmail.com>
description: Universal AI-agent memory — MCP client for agent-memories server

scripts.build: npm run build:types && npm run build:js && npm run build:skill
scripts.build:js: esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/cli.js --platform=node --format=esm --minify --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external:zod && cp dist/cli.js dist/agent-memories-mcp && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/agent-memories-mcp > dist/agent-memories-mcp.tmp && mv dist/agent-memories-mcp.tmp dist/agent-memories-mcp && chmod +x dist/agent-memories-mcp
scripts.build:skill: cp SKILL.md dist/ && cp -r references/ dist/references/
scripts.test: echo 'Tests need import path updates for monorepo'
